items.name: TradePostMortem
items.description: TradePostmortem** is a Solana wallet trade analyzer. A user pastes their wallet address, the app pulls their recent swaps from chain, prices each entry and exit using historical OHLCV data, and outputs a ranked breakdown of their worst trades with specific, actionable diagnoses. Every result is shareable as a card on X.
